title: gaura coccinea var. parvifolia
intro: Gaura coccinea var. parvifolia, also known as smallflower beeblaze, is a perennial plant species belonging to the evening primrose family. The plant is used for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it effective in treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Gaura coccinea var. parvifolia include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically to treat skin conditions and wounds.
